reviews.school_name: NASR School for Boys - P Janardhan Reddy Nagar,Gachibowli

school_address.streetAddress: Survey No. 47, Serilingampally, 1-72-4/4, NASR Boys School Rd, P Janardhan Reddy Nagar, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana 500081, India

reviews.author: Samy Ab
reviews.review_body: If you are looking for a school where your kids have sound grounding and practical knowledge of Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and Biology Nasr is not a school for you, the school has really dearth of quality teachers in these subjects. The style of teaching and methodology is rather 1950's and tend not to change and adapt to changing times, there is absolutely no practical and innovative methodology. Sadly, nice ambience and impressive buildings doesn't make one a good school, rather quality of teaching bonded with creativity and emphasis on quality makes school standout, and Nasr school has failed in these aspects stunningly.Lastly, most students talk in Urdu and Nasr's students has disastrously poor communication and written English language skills.

reviews.school_name: NASR School for Boys - P Janardhan Reddy Nagar,Gachibowli
reviews.author: Sharjill Baig
reviews.review_body:
You won't get a better school in Hyderabad
The icse curriculum is very helpful and interesting
The campus is serene and peaceful
The classes are very spacious and comfortable
All the teachers are extremely good and helpful
The school doesn't just focus on your academics but also on your all round development (but don't worry it still focuses on your academics first - it helped me get 97.4%)
Over all, I think I would have been a much lesser man than I am right now if it weren't for this great school
THANK YOU NASR!!!!!!

reviews.school_name: NASR School for Boys - P Janardhan Reddy Nagar,Gachibowli
reviews.author: Mohammed Bilal Siddiqui
reviews.review_body: The best education system for child growth. Some of the rules of school might disappoint parents but the way they guide and educate the child shows a result in the child behaviour, education etc. Which I have noticed in my child before and after inducting my schools in the student. I can’t express the words for the school, just you need to have some patience and see the growth of your child 😊. Once he/she scores good grades in examination and raise your head towards the sky. I’m glad that they give a chance be a part of Nasr school. My son has become more responsible from before etc. All I want to Thank the management and the staff for the growth of my child ☺️🤗

reviews.school_name: NASR School for Boys - P Janardhan Reddy Nagar,Gachibowli
reviews.author: Radhika g
reviews.review_body: Great campus and pleasant environment, I am so glad to have my children’s admission in this school and look forward for their brilliant development. Wonderful management of school with very good teachers and helpful staff.

reviews.school_name: NASR School for Boys - P Janardhan Reddy Nagar,Gachibowli
reviews.author: waseem fatima
reviews.review_body:
I didn't like the admission procedure at all.The age criteria is very different when compared to other ICSE schools.
Poor management and no value for time.They make you wait for hours, while knowing that kids cannot wait for so long.
All in all,even though my child was selected,I wouldn't be admitting him in this school.
Good campus and location but they lack in discipline and management.
